permissions.name: Admin
permissions.description: Admin is allowed to do everything

permissions.name: Status
permissions.description: Allows to gather basic status information, e.g. job progress, printer state, temperatures, ... Mandatory for the default UI to work

permissions.name: Connection
permissions.description: Allows to connect to and disconnect from a printer

permissions.name: Webcam
permissions.description: Allows to watch the webcam stream

permissions.name: System
permissions.description: Allows to run system commands, e.g. restart OctoPrint, shutdown or reboot the system, and to retrieve system and usage information

permissions.name: File List
permissions.description: Allows to retrieve a list of all uploaded files and folders, includingtheir metadata (e.g. date, file size, analysis results, ...)

permissions.name: File Upload
permissions.description: Allows users to upload new files, create new folders and copy existing ones. If the File Delete permission is also set, File Upload also allows moving files and folders.

permissions.name: File Download
permissions.description: Allows users to download files. The GCODE viewer is affected by this as well.

permissions.name: File Delete
permissions.description: Allows users to delete files and folders. If the File Upload permission is also set, File Delete also allows moving files and folders.

permissions.name: File Select
permissions.description: Allows to select a file for printing

permissions.name: Print
permissions.description: Allows to start, pause and cancel a print job

permissions.name: GCODE viewer
permissions.description: Allows access to the GCODE viewer if the "File Download"permission is also set.

permissions.name: Terminal
permissions.description: Allows to watch the terminal tab but not to send commands to the printer from it

permissions.name: Control
permissions.description: Allows to control of the printer by using the temperature controls,the control tab or sending commands through the terminal.

permissions.name: Slice
permissions.description: Allows to slice files

permissions.name: Timelapse List
permissions.description: Allows to list timelapse videos

permissions.name: Timelapse Download
permissions.description: Allows to download timelapse videos

permissions.name: Timelapse Delete
permissions.description: Allows to delete timelapse videos

permissions.name: Timelapse Manage Unrendered
permissions.description: Allows to list, delete and render unrendered timelapses

permissions.name: Timelapse Admin
permissions.description: Allows to change the timelapse settings.

permissions.name: Settings Access
permissions.description: Allows to read non sensitive settings. Mandatory for the default UI to work.

permissions.name: Settings Admin
permissions.description: Allows to manage settings and also to read sensitive settings

permissions.name: Achievements Plugin: View instance achievements & stats
permissions.description: Allows to view the instance achievements & stats.

permissions.name: Achievements Plugin: Reset instance achievements & stats
permissions.description: Allows to reset the instance achievements & stats.

permissions.name: Action Command Notification Support: Show printer notifications
permissions.description: Allows to see printer notifications

permissions.name: Action Command Notification Support: Clear printer notifications
permissions.description: Allows to clear printer notifications

permissions.name: Action Command Prompt Support: Interact with printer prompts
permissions.description: Allows to see and interact with printer prompts

permissions.name: Announcement Plugin: Read announcements
permissions.description: Allows to read announcements

permissions.name: Announcement Plugin: Manage announcement subscriptions
permissions.description: Allows to manage announcement subscriptions. Includes "Read announcements" permission

permissions.name: Application Keys Plugin: Admin access
permissions.description: Allows administrating all application keys

permissions.name: Application Keys Plugin: Grant access
permissions.description: Allows to grant app access

permissions.name: Backup & Restore: Create backup
permissions.description: Allows to trigger the creation of backups

permissions.name: File Check: Run File Check
permissions.description: Allows to run File Check and view the results.

permissions.name: Firmware Check: Display firmware check warnings
permissions.description: Allows to see firmware check warnings

permissions.name: Healthcheck Plugin: Perform healthchecks
permissions.description: Allows to perform health checks and view their results

permissions.name: Logging: Logging management
permissions.description: Allows to download and delete log files and list and set log levels.

permissions.name: Pi Support Plugin: Status
permissions.description: Allows to check for the Pi's throttling status and environment info

permissions.name: Plugin Manager: List plugins
permissions.description: Allows to list installed plugins.

permissions.name: Plugin Manager: Manage plugins
permissions.description: Allows to enable, disable and uninstall installed plugins.

permissions.name: Plugin Manager: Install new plugins
permissions.description: Allows to install new plugins. Includes the "Manage plugins" permission.

permissions.name: Software Update: Check
permissions.description: Allows to check for software updates

permissions.name: Software Update: Update
permissions.description: Allows to perform software updates

permissions.name: Software Update: Configure
permissions.description: Allows to configure software update

logs: Printer seems to support the busy protocol, will adjust timeouts and set busy interval accordingly
Changing monitoring state from "Operational" to "Starting print from SD"
Changing monitoring state from "Starting print from SD" to "Printing from SD"
